title: Bundle sweep 1: single-engine total=4 same=2 forward-hash
methodology: Changed the instruction bundler to flush after 4 total ops and 2 ops on one engine, with single-engine bundles. Kept the original hash stage order.
motivation: Brief insight: ## Research Brief: Anthropic Performance Takehome (perf-takehome). Building on exp-001-baseline-unoptimized by changing bundle packing policy.
